title: Palette Generator
shortDescription: Generate a simple color palette online from one base color for UI, branding and quick concept work.
metaTitle: Palette Generator | Build color palettes online
metaDescription: Generate color palettes online from one base color. Useful for branding, UI systems, quick concept boards and CSS work.
intro: Use the palette generator when one color needs a few supporting tones for a UI, design system or brand concept. It creates a ready-to-scan set of swatches from a single base color so you can move faster through moodboards, components and theme experiments.
overview: The generator is built for fast palette exploration rather than heavy design software. It works well for quick color systems, early branding, landing page experiments and developer-friendly theme starting points.
howItWorks: Select how many swatches you want in the palette.
Review the generated colors and use the HEX values in your design or code.

examples.title: UI palette
examples.output: A set of lighter and darker supporting swatches
examples.description: Helpful for buttons, surfaces, highlights and states.

examples.title: Brand exploration
examples.output: A broader palette for quick concept boards
examples.description: Useful during early branding and moodboard work.

faq.question: How many colors can I generate?
faq.answer: The tool creates compact palettes with several supporting shades from one base color.

faq.question: Is this useful for CSS themes?
faq.answer: Yes. The generated HEX values are practical for CSS variables, tokens and quick theme drafts.
